title: oenanthe montis-khortiati
intro: Oenanthe montis-khortiati, also known as the Greek water dropwort, is a perennial plant species native to Greece. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system. Oenanthe montis-khortiati can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water, or it can be used in tincture or extract form, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
